prose: The calculation failed due to an error in argument parsing by chemkit: "unrecognized arguments: --phase /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz." The issue is related to the engine not recognizing the provided `--phase` parameter when coupled with the specified molecule file. The logs for this failure can be found live or retrospectively at: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/argo_gpt-4o/20260703-230550_oxygen_frontier_orbitals/frontier_20260703-230555.out. Immediate debugging or reporting of this parameter issue within your version of chemkit is advised to proceed further.
